caption: Champs-Élysées at sunset
alt_text: Wide avenue of the Champs-Élysées bathed in warm sunset light, with trees lining both sides and the Arc de Triomphe in the distance

caption: Bois de Boulogne
alt_text: Tranquil path through the Bois de Boulogne park with tall trees casting dappled light on the ground

caption: Montmartre
alt_text: Narrow cobblestone street in Montmartre lined with charming Parisian buildings and a quiet café terrace

caption: Sacré-Cœur interior
alt_text: Ornate golden mosaic interior of the Sacré-Cœur basilica with vaulted ceilings and glowing candlelight

caption: Banks of the Seine
alt_text: Serene banks of the Seine river in Paris with stone quays, moored boats and historic bridges in the background

caption: Galerie Vivienne
alt_text: Elegant glass-roofed Galerie Vivienne passage in Paris with mosaic tile floors and ornate 19th-century architecture

caption: Hôtel de Ville
alt_text: Gothic façade of the Hôtel de Ville Paris city hall illuminated against a cloudy sky

caption: Parisian rooftops
alt_text: Panoramic view of classic Parisian rooftops with grey zinc chimneys and Haussmann-style buildings stretching to the horizon

caption: Sunset in the Marais
alt_text: Golden hour sunset light washing over the colourful storefronts and pedestrians of the Marais neighbourhood in Paris

caption: Eiffel Tower at dusk
alt_text: Eiffel Tower silhouetted against a rich gradient dusk sky shifting from deep orange to twilight blue

caption: Sunset over the tram lines
alt_text: Vibrant orange and pink sunset sky over Parisian tram tracks with silhouettes of pedestrians and vehicles

caption: Pink skies over Haussmann architecture
alt_text: Pastel pink and lavender clouds above elegant curved Haussmann building with wrought-iron balconies in Paris

caption: The Panthéon through Rue Soufflot
alt_text: Street view of the Panthéon dome framed by Parisian apartment buildings under a blue sky with scattered clouds

caption: Eiffel Tower at blue hour
alt_text: Eiffel Tower illuminated in golden light against a deep blue twilight sky, viewed from below

caption: Departure board
alt_text: Electronic departure board at a Puglia train station showing destination Bari Centrale with platform number and delay information at golden hour

caption: Sunset over the tracks
alt_text: Silhouette of railway tracks and overhead electric lines against a vivid pink and purple sunset sky near Bari, Puglia

caption: Golden wheat fields in the Apulian countryside
alt_text: Expansive golden wheat field under a bright blue sky with white clouds, with the Bari city skyline visible in the distance

caption: Frescoed dome ceiling of S. Nicola church
alt_text: Ornate frescoed dome ceiling of a Baroque church near Bari featuring angels, religious figures, gold rosette details, and a stained glass window

caption: Authentic pizza with mozzarella and salsiccia
alt_text: Freshly baked Neapolitan-style pizza topped with mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, and salsiccia served on a white plate next to a Coca-Cola bottle

caption: Bari lungomare at night
alt_text: Nighttime view of the Bari seafront promenade with illuminated Christmas tree reflecting blue and pink lights on the calm Adriatic Sea

caption: Bari Pride
alt_text: Large crowd gathered in Piazza Prefettura in Bari for Pride celebrations, with colorful rainbow flags and historic buildings in the background
